narration: To count 1 bits, first inspect the last bit.
callout: AND with 1 tells whether the final bit is on.

narration: Then shift right so the next bit moves into the last position.
decision: Check the last bit, shift right, and repeat.

choices.label: Whether the last bit is 1
choices.feedback: Correct. AND with 1 inspects the current last bit.

choices.label: How many 1s are in the whole number
choices.feedback: Not this one. It checks only the last bit.

narration: Eventually every bit gets inspected because the number keeps shrinking to the right.
callout: That is why the loop finishes after checking all bits.
